attacking_style: Not an attacker by profile. Lacks explosive acceleration needed for late-race moves or finishing sprints, particularly in final 150m when power demands peak.
team_tactics: Benefits from strong leadout positioning but cannot convert advantageous placement into results. Team invests in setup but finishing speed insufficient to capitalize.
terrain_preference: Struggles exposed on both sustained high-pace flat sections and sprint finishes. No clear terrain strength demonstrated; weaknesses visible across profiles.
vulnerability: Cannot respond when pace lifts sharply (dropped at 40km) or when sprints require sustained high-end power from 150m out. Pace selection and finishing speed both problematic.
key_patterns: Positioned well by team but lacks finishing speed to convert (2 observations).
Dropped when race pace intensifies, unable to handle sustained tempo increases (2 observations).
Deficiencies in final 150m power output cost results despite tactical positioning (2 observations).
form_trajectory: negative: consistent pattern of being unable to handle race-winning intensities across both 2019-2020 observations
